name: Giant/Giantess RPG
description:
TW: Idk it depends on what you do.

You're a giant/giantess the size of a skyscraper who walks into a dense human city because you're bored, duh.

What you can do:

Destroy the city, be a menace to Earth.

Be a gentle giant, and be kind towards the small humans.

Idk, just walk away

and more!
creator: Violet_Glow
